title: Batch test providers
overLimit: Selection exceeds the limit; only the first {max} will be tested.

model.label: Test model
model.placeholder: Leave empty to use type defaults
model.hint: The model is applied to every selected provider. Leave empty to use the default test model for each provider type.

errors.nothingToApply: There are no changes to apply.
errors.previewExpired: The preview expired. Create a new preview.
errors.previewStale: Provider settings changed after the preview. Create a new preview.
errors.idempotencyConflict: This idempotency key was already used for another operation.
errors.undoExpired: The undo window expired or was already used.
errors.undoConflict: The undo token does not match this operation.
errors.undoStale: The provider can no longer be restored automatically. Refresh and review its current state.
